name: Programming and Interrogation of Device
description: The device is programmed via the Medtronic CareLink 2090 Programmer using radiofrequency telemetry. Before MRI, a clinician must confirm all implanted leads are SureScan-compatible, enable SureScan mode via the programmer, set the SureScan pacing rate for the patient, and after the scan, disable SureScan mode and restore nominal programming.
